zh.Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandie,: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-維其特
zh.Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾胡可 諾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton於1040年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-維其特時，他的父親Gilbert d'Oilly27歲，母親Frances Barney32歲。他於大約1065年與Agnes de Amic結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1074年被列為constable of england - to king william rufus。他去世於大約1115年在英國奧可福爾胡可 諾頓享年76歲。

zh-hans.Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandie,: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-維其特
zh-hans.Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾胡可 諾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton于1040年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-維其特时，他的父亲Gilbert d'Oilly27岁，母亲Frances Barney32岁。他于大约1065年与Agnes de Amic结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1074年被列为constable of england - to king william rufus。他去世于大约1115年在英国奧可福爾胡可 諾頓享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oylly,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Olley with fused Old French preposition d' ‘from’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

variants.name: Dilley
meanings: English: possibly a pet form of an unrecorded Old English personal name Dylla, found as the first element in the placenames Dillington (in the former Huntingdonshire) and Dilton (in Wiltshire). The name may sometimes have been confused with Doyley and Dolley (see Olley ).
German: variant of   Dilly   or a surname of French origin, an altered form of   Delay  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Dilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Nigel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval name Nigellus, a Latinized version (ostensibly representing a diminutive of Latin niger ‘black’) of the vernacular Ni(h)el, i.e. Neil . Although it is frequently found in medieval records, this form was probably not used in everyday life before its revival by antiquarians such as Sir Walter Scott in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton was born in 1040, in Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Gilbert d'Oilly, was 27 and his mother, Frances Barney, was 32. He married Agnes de Amic about 1065. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1074, his occupation is listed as constable of england - to king william rufus. He died about 1115, in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton est né en 1040, à Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Gilbert d'Oilly, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Frances Barney, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Amic environ 1065. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1074, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of england - to king william rufus. Il est décédé environ 1115, à Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton 1040 in Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert d'Oilly 27 und seine Mutter Frances Barney 32. Er hat um 1065 Agnes de Amic geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1074 ist sein Beruf als constable of england - to king william rufus aufgeführt. Er starb um 1115 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton è nato il nel 1040 nel Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Gilbert d'Oilly, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Frances Barney, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Amic circa 1065. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1074, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of england - to king william rufus. Morì circa 1115, nel Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknortonが1040年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスオウイリ-レ-ヴィコムトで生まれた時，父Gilbert d'Oillyは27歳，母Frances Barneyは32歳であった。約1065年にAgnes de Amicと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1074年，職業はconstable of england - to king william rufusと記録されている。彼は約1115年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホーオク ノートンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton(이)가 1040년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 우이리-레-빅트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert d'Oilly(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Barney(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1065년 Agnes de Amic(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1074년, 그의 직업은 constable of england - to king william rufus이었다. 그는 대략 1115년 영국 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton nasceu em 1040, em Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Gilbert d'Oilly, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Frances Barney, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Amic aproximadamente 1065. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1074, sua profissão aparece como constable of england - to king william rufus. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1115, em Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton родился в 1040 г. в местности оуилли-ле-викомт, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gilbert d'Oilly было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Barney, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Amic около 1065 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1074 году он работал по профессии constable of england - to king william rufus. Он умер около 1115 г. в местности хук нортон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

sm.from 1074 to 1090: mai le 1074 e o'o I le 1090

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton nació en 1040, en Ouilly-le-Vicomte, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gilbert d'Oilly, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Frances Barney, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes de Amic aproximadamente 1065. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1074, su ocupación registrada era constable of england - to king william rufus. Murió aproximadamente 1115, en Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
